title: Cuneiform Tablet #0558: Old Assyrian Inventory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Inventory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records inventory matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
